K J Packs

K J Packs is a growing carton box manufacturing company based in Coimbatore, specializing in high-quality corrugated packaging solutions. We manufacture durable carton boxes, corrugated rolls and white board boxes for various industries including pump, motor, textile and general manufacturing sectors. We focus on providing reliable quality, fast delivery and fully customized packaging solutions to meet our clients’ exact requirements.

Our Products

Product Catalogue

Shipping & Storage

Corrugated Boxes

We manufacture high-quality customized corrugated carton boxes suitable for heavy-duty and industrial use. Available in 3, 5, 7, 9 and more ply options, our boxes are designed to provide maximum strength and protection.

  • Custom Sizes Available
  • Strong & Durable
Wrapping & Cushioning

Corrugated Rolls

Our corrugated rolls are ideal for packaging, wrapping and cushioning applications. Available in various widths and GSM quality, they ensure safe handling and transport of goods.

  • All Width Sizes Available
  • Required GSM Quality
Retail & Branding

White Board Boxes

We manufacture premium white board boxes for clean and professional packaging. Suitable for retail, food and industrial applications with custom design options.

  • Clean & Premium Finish
  • Custom Design Available
